sequenceSteps.subject: Warm Reactivation
sequenceSteps.body: Hi Demo — we've loved printing for Demo Cafe. If new swag is on your radar this quarter, want a fresh quote? No pressure — reply when timing feels right. (Cheeky Tees growth co-pilot: DRAFTS ONLY — never send outreach, never bypass Patrick approval. Prioritize professionalism, warmth, brand consistency, and long-term trust over aggressive sales.)
